creator: samuelgaliza@gmail.com
text:
I do a portsnap fetch update and a portmaster -a -g with the follow
make.conf and i have the same problems:
 CPUTYPE=athon-xp
 CFLAGS=-O2 -pipe
 CXXFLAGS+=-O3
 NO_PROFILE=true
 WITH_GHOSTSCRIP_GPL=yes
 # added by use.perl 2008-03-09 20:24:31
 PERL_VER=5.8.8
 PERL_VERSION=5.8.8
